body: TUNGSTEN SMITHING -- pass 24 report. Shipped WARRANT#37 -> SLS(52)/9.66: forge-edge-2 r3 (cell-informed TP/SL). Pure LE_ComputeBracketSL/TP functions -- blend the existing MFE/MAE excursion data with the new dwell tau50, clamped within each regimes own calibrated SL/TP multiplier ceiling. Deliberately NOT wired into TryPlaceSignAgnosticBracket (the existing gated, real order-placing function) this pass -- kept as a separate future warrant since that function already places orders when its flag is on. Compiled clean, trivial identity invariant (brand new, entirely uncalled functions, nothing existing touched). Continuing to forge-indicate r3 (Pillar C combination) next.
